pages.text: One sunny afternoon, <name> tiptoed into the kitchen. On the counter sat a big, round ladoo, shiny and sweet. Just as he reached out to grab it — the ladoo wiggled!
“Hey! Did you just move?” <name> gasped. The ladoo gave a little bounce and rolled off the plate!
“Come back, you silly sweet!” <name> laughed, chasing it across the floor. The ladoo rolled faster, zooming past the chair, under the table, and straight toward the door!
Just then, Chotu the puppy saw it too. “Woof! A round toy!” he barked, wagging his tail and running after it. <name> slipped on a banana peel — whoosh! — and slid across the floor like a superhero!

The ladoo rolled into the living room, bumping into Papa’s foot. “What’s going on here?” Papa laughed as the ladoo wiggled again. Finally, <name> scooped it up and held it tight. “Got you!” he said proudly. The ladoo stopped dancing at last, sitting perfectly still.

Mama peeked in and started giggling. “I think that ladoo just wanted some exercise!” Everyone burst into laughter — even Chotu barked in delight. And from that day, whenever <name> saw a ladoo, he always checked to make sure it wasn’t planning to dance away again!
